vars.name: DECK_IP
vars.comment: Same-machine Deck (Cursor on Deck): use loopback so build/screenshot skip SSH-to-self DECK_IP=127.0.0.1 LAN example (override for your network): DECK_IP=192.168.86.52

vars.name: DECK_DIR
vars.comment: Cursor debug NDJSON ingest (Deck plugin posts to 127.0.0.1 on the Deck). From your PC run: ./scripts/reverse-tunnel-deck-ingest.ps1 (or .sh) so Deck:7682 forwards here. DEBUG_INGEST_PORT=7682 This machine's IP (for Ollama -- the Deck connects back to this)
